title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Amity University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Amity University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amity University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Amity University:
Amity University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
